description: Qwen3.5 decode-path depthwise causal conv1d update fused with SiLU. The conv_state input is updated in-place.
name: qwen3_5_causal_conv1d_update_silu
reference:
# Source: https://github.com/huggingface/transformers/blob/aad13b87ed59f2afcfaebc985f403301887a35fc/src/transformers/models/qwen3_5/modeling_qwen3_5.py#L545-L554
import torch

def run(hidden_states, conv_state, weight, bias=None, activation=None):
    x = hidden_states[:, :, 0]
    full = torch.cat([conv_state, x.unsqueeze(-1)], dim=-1)
    dot = (full * weight.unsqueeze(0)).sum(-1)
    output = dot * torch.sigmoid(dot)
    conv_state[:, :, 0] = conv_state[:, :, 1]
    conv_state[:, :, 1] = conv_state[:, :, 2]
    conv_state[:, :, 2] = x
    return output.unsqueeze(-1)
